PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dylan Hyatt for Petitioner.

The Court stated that the only issue is that probate was opened with a caption of "Rigoberto Esquivel" and that it was presented with an order that has his middle name of Marvin. Mr. Hyatt stated that he is happy to provide a revised order. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (revised order signed in open Court). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for April 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
